description_long: This object is a very small doll, appearing as a dark, compact figure with minimal visible detail due to its scale. The silhouette suggests a humanoid form, with a rounded head and a body that tapers slightly, possibly indicating arms and legs, though these features are not clearly defined. The surface appears uniform in color and texture, with no visible clothing, facial features, or accessories discernible at this resolution. The doll is likely made from a single material, such as plastic or rubber, given its solid and seamless appearance. Its size suggests it could be a miniature toy, easily held in the palm of a hand or used as a figurine in playsets. The object is not large enough to serve any functional purpose beyond being a toy or collectible.
description: A tiny, dark-colored humanoid doll with a simple, seamless form and no visible details or accessories.
